diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,177 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+This ledger documents the structure, key names, and simple notes of files in the hono routing system.
+
+## src/hono.ts
+
+- Purpose: Main entry point for the Hono application class. Combines HonoBase with routers to provide full routing functionality, smart router strategy by default.
+- Names noticed: `Hono`, `HonoBase`, `RegExpRouter`, `SmartRouter`, `HonoOptions`
+- Simple note: Wraps HonoBase and sets default router to SmartRouter with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter fallback.
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+
+- Purpose: Core base class providing request handling, middleware support, error handling, route registration, and request dispatching.
+- Names noticed: `HonoBase`, `Hono`, `Context`, `compose`, `Router`, `METHODS`, `METHOD_NAME_ALL`, `METHOD_NAME_ALL_LOWERCASE`, `notFoundHandler`, `errorHandler`, `GetPath`, `HonoOptions`, `MountOptionHandler`, `MountReplaceRequest`, `MountOptions`, `COMPOSED_HANDLER`, `getPath`, `getPathNoStrict`, `mergePath`
+- Simple note: Implements .get, .post, .put, .delete, .all, .on, .use methods, supports .route, .basePath, .onError, .notFound, .mount, .fetch, .request, .fire. Has private _basePath and #path.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Barrel export file for PatternRouter.
+- Names noticed: `PatternRouter`
+- Simple note: Single line export delegates all routing to router.ts.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Regex-based router that compiles path patterns into regular expressions for matching, supports named parameters and wildcards.
+- Names noticed: `PatternRouter`, `Params`, `Result`, `Router`, `METHOD_NAME_ALL`, `UnsupportedPathError`, `emptyParams`, route type `[RegExp, string, T]`
+- Simple note: Converts :param and :param{regex} to RegExp patterns, iterates all patterns linearly in match, supports optional parameters and wildcards.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Barrel export file for LinearRouter.
+- Names noticed: `LinearRouter`
+- Simple note: Single line export delegates all routing to router.ts.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Linear sequential router that matches against stored routes in registration order without precompilation.
+- Names noticed: `LinearRouter`, `Params`, `Result`, `Router`, `METHOD_NAME_ALL`, `UnsupportedPathError`, `checkOptionalParameter`
+- Simple note: Stores routes as plain strings, matches each route linearly, handles :param labels, *, /* wildcards, rejects invalid patterns like :param with {.*}.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Barrel export file for RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter.
+- Names noticed: `RegExpRouter`, `PreparedRegExpRouter`, `buildInitParams`, `serializeInitParams`
+- Simple note: Exports both dynamic (RegExpRouter) and serializable (PreparedRegExpRouter) versions.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Builds compiled regex matchers from routes, implements two-phase routing with middleware and static routes.
+- Names noticed: `RegExpRouter`, `MessageMatcherIsAlreadyBuilt`, `UnsupportedPathError`, `Builder`, `checkOptionalParameter`, `ParamsIndexMap`, `Router`, `HandlerData`, `StaticMap`, `Matcher`, `MatcherMap`, `ParamAssocArray`, `Node`, `Trie`, `match`, `emptyParam`
+- Simple note: Routes are preprocessed, trie is built, regex is compiled, static routes stored in map, match() runs on-demand. Throws if routes cannot be compiled.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+
+- Purpose: Defines matcher type and matching logic for RegExpRouter.
+- Names noticed: `ParamIndexMap`, `Result`, `Router`, `HandlerData`, `StaticMap`, `Matcher`, `MatcherMap`, `emptyParam`
+- Simple note: match() function builds matchers on first call, checks static routes first then runs regex, returns matched handler with param index mapping.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Makes RegExpRouter stateless and serializable by preprocessing routes into static match structures.
+- Names noticed: `PreparedRegExpRouter`, `MATCHER`, `RelocateMap`, `buildInitParams`, `serializeInitParams`, `StaticMap`, `Matcher`, `MatcherMap`, `HandlerData`
+- Simple note: Preprocesses paths into matchers and relocateMap, PreparedRegExpRouter uses only those, add() adds handlers, match() instantiates no new matchers.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+
+- Purpose: Defines matcher type and matching logic for RegExpRouter.
+- Names noticed: `ParamIndexMap`, `Result`, `Router`, `emptyParam`, `emptyParam`
+- Simple note: match() function rebuilds matchers each call, uses static route map if direct hit, falls back to regex match.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Serializes matchers so RegExpRouter output can be captured and reused without runtime regex building.
+- Names noticed: `PreparedRegExpRouter`, `Builder`, `RelocateMap`, `buildInitParams`, `serializeInitParams`
+- Simple note: Constructor accepts ready-made matchers and relocate map, add() stores new routes in relocated form, match() uses cached result.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+
+- Purpose: Node-based trie structure for building expression patterns from routing paths.
+- Names noticed: `PATH_ERROR`, `ParamAssocArray`, `Context`, `ONLY_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR`, `TAIL_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR`, `LABEL_REG_EXP_STR`
+- Simple note: Node has children map and index/varIndex, insert() builds trie from path tokens, buildRegExpStr() constructs expression, sort orders wildcards before literals.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+
+- Purpose: Builds regular expression from trie structure, handles param reindexing.
+- Names noticed: `Context`, `ParamAssocArray`, `Node`, `ReplacementMap`
+- Simple note: Replaces param markers {pattern} with original, runs insert on root node, buildRegExp() extracts index map and param replacement map from regExpStr.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Barrel export file for SmartRouter.
+- Names noticed: `SmartRouter`
+- Simple note: Single line export delegates all routing to router.ts.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Adaptive router that delegates to sub-routers like RegExpRouter, caches successful router after route registration.
+- Names noticed: `SmartRoute
